series_metadata.series_description: Use Warrant Cancellation or Erroneous EFT Transmittal form when a non-payroll warrant is issued in error and the agency has the warrant or when a non-payroll EFT payment is made in error. Use a Stop Payment of Warrants form when a non-payroll warrant was issued in error and the agency does not have the warrant. Use a Claim for Reissuance of Voided Warrant Due to Age form when a warrant has voided for age (not cashed during three-month period after issue date). Use a Voided Warrant Certification when a new warrant for the same obligation needs to be issued.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: official audit report has been received from Auditor of State. ; Electronic: official audit report has been received from Auditor of State
